programs.desc: Political pressures come into play after an F-14 pilot clips a ski helicopter during a NATO exercise over Italian airspace, killing six civilians.

programs.desc: Bud's stag night does not go according to plan, throwing the whole wedding into jeopardy!

programs.title: Bull
programs.desc: Bull is hired by a doctor, Samir Shadid, who's accused by the Manhattan US attorney of bribing his way into college, just as Bull's ex-wife, Isabella, is due to give birth.

programs.title: JAG
programs.desc: Harm learns that after being shot down during the Vietnam War his father was taken to Russia, so he and Mac go on a desperate search for him and end up in Moscow, where they get into a dispute with the local government.

programs.title: JAG
programs.desc: The JAG team led by Commander Harm Rabb investigate another military case. Harm's search for his father continues in Russia, where he eventually discovers his father's fate.

programs.title: Bull
programs.desc: Bull assists in the murder trial defence of an old friend - a professional gambler accused of killing her wealthy father to cash in on inheritance.
